subProject: Plane-2a — class-core eval-sharing PoC (archetype-once + axis-delta, units-level, parity-gated)

tasks.subject: Task 0: pick class + discover Delta + re-confirm baseline marginal
tasks.description: Largest same-class group via .#den-debug.classKey + partition.py at N=10/50/100; deltaKeys via one-time host0-vs-host1 units drvPath diff (sharedKeys = complement); parity-clean check sharedKeys drvPath-identical across >=3 hosts (nftables residual excluded); re-confirm vanilla marginal ~21.7M.

metadata.verifyCommand: 2a-baseline.md has class, deltaKeys/sharedKeys split, parity-clean check, marginal ~21.7M

tasks.subject: Task 1: synth-measure/2a-share.sh vanilla-vs-2a copies differential, parity-gated
tasks.description: One eval (canonicalize=false): archUnits = host0 sharedKeys forced once; hostUnits2a h = archUnits // genAttrs deltaKeys (realUnits h); vanilla = deepSeq N full vs 2a = deepSeq [archUnits, Delta_1..N-1]; copies via synth_measure_reps; per-key parity gate ERRORS before measuring if any sharedKey diverges. Honest: marginal_2a includes per-host module-merge WHNF (paid both); saving = shared deep-construction.

metadata.verifyCommand: SYNTH_N=10 bash synth-measure/2a-share.sh: differential table, marginal_2a < marginal_vanilla strict, parity gate green
acceptanceCriteria: parity gate fires pre-measure + errors on divergence

tasks.subject: Task 2: sweep N {2,10,50,100} x K classes -- saving(N) + marginal collapse
tasks.description: Sweep SYNTH_N {2,10,50,100} on >=2 classes; saving(N) ~linear; marginal_2a << marginal_vanilla (or honest negative if module-merge dominates, with decomposition); marginal collapse quantified.

metadata.verifyCommand: 2a-result.md: saving(N) table N{2,10,50,100} on >=2 classes + marginal-collapse number

tasks.subject: Task 3: tests/2a-share-test.sh -- gate teeth + monotonic saving
tasks.description: Committed test: 2a units drvPath-identical to vanilla (identity); planted out-of-axis leak => parity gate REJECTS (teeth, mirrors parity-oracle.sh); saving(50) > saving(10) > 0 (monotonic); passes via daemon path.

metadata.verifyCommand: bash synth-measure/tests/2a-share-test.sh: all PASS; leak => gate REJECT

tasks.subject: Task 4: evidence + tracker + memory + S1 handoff
tasks.description: Commit 2a-share.sh + test (worktree, den UNCHANGED) prose msg w/ saving + 5 bounds; 2a-result.md headline to papers; tasks.json complete; project_hola.md CURRENT STATE tail in place (Plane-2a done + number, next=S1); surface number to user; proceed to S1 (apply 3 reviewer fixes first).

metadata.verifyCommand: git log -1; 2a-result.md present; memory tail has the number
